message:
🐛 Fix feedback error message not showing actual backend error (#1632)

The custom Fiber error handler returns {error: "..."} but the frontend
was only checking parsed.message, causing every submission failure to
show the generic "Unable to submit — GitHub login may be required"
instead of the actual error (e.g., missing FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
